dev.lyze.gdxUnBox2d

Class UnBox<TPhysicsWorld extends PhysicsWorld<?,?,?>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.lyze.gdxUnBox2d.UnBox<TPhysicsWorld>

  • public class UnBox<TPhysicsWorld extends PhysicsWorld<?,?,?>>
extends java.lang.Object

    The main object of the library. Holds all game objects and behaviours. Additionally, calculates physics with Box2D.

    Make sure to call preRender(float), render(Batch), postRender() in your ApplicationListener.render() loop in this order.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      UnBox(TPhysicsWorld physicsWorld)
      Instantiates an instance of this object.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void adjustExecutionOrder() 
      void debugRender(space.earlygrey.shapedrawer.ShapeDrawer drawer)
      Renders behaviours with a shape drawer, therefore commonly used for debugging.
      void debugRender(com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.glutils.ShapeRenderer renderer)
      Renders behaviours with a shape renderer, therefore commonly used for debugging.
      void destroy(Behaviour behaviour)
      Marks the behaviour for deletion at the end of the current frame.
      void destroy(GameObject go)
      Marks the game object and all its behaviour for deletion at the end of the current frame.
      <T extends Behaviour>
      com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<T>      		 findBehaviours(java.lang.Class<T> behaviourClass)
      Finds all behaviour instances with the specified type.
      <T extends Behaviour>
      com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<T>      		 findBehaviours(java.lang.Class<T> behaviourClass, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<T> tempStorage)
      Finds all behaviour instances with the specified type.
      PhysicsOptions getOptions() 
      TPhysicsWorld getPhysicsWorld() 
      void invalidateRenderOrder()
      When a behaviours render order gets updated unBox doesn't get notified about that, hence you need to call this method afterwards.
      void postRender()
      Instantiates and destroys pending game objects or behaviours.
      void preRender(float delta)
      Starts behaviours, calls fixedUpdate(float), updateGameObjects(float) and lateUpdateGameObjects(float).o Call this at the beginning of your render loop.
      void render(com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.Batch batch)
      Renders behaviours.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • UnBox

        public UnBox(TPhysicsWorld physicsWorld)
        Instantiates an instance of this object.

    • Method Detail

      • preRender

        public void preRender(float delta)
        Starts behaviours, calls fixedUpdate(float), updateGameObjects(float) and lateUpdateGameObjects(float).o Call this at the beginning of your render loop.
        Parameters:
        delta - The delta time compared to the previous time. Graphics.getDeltaTime()

      • adjustExecutionOrder

        public void adjustExecutionOrder()

      • render

        public void render(com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.Batch batch)
        Renders behaviours. Call this after preRender(float).
        Parameters:
        batch - The batch used to render the behaviours.

      • debugRender

        public void debugRender(com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.glutils.ShapeRenderer renderer)
        Renders behaviours with a shape renderer, therefore commonly used for debugging. Call this after preRender(float).
        Parameters:
        renderer - The shape renderer used to render the behaviours.

      • debugRender

        public void debugRender(space.earlygrey.shapedrawer.ShapeDrawer drawer)
        Renders behaviours with a shape drawer, therefore commonly used for debugging. Call this after preRender(float).
        Parameters:
        drawer - The shape drawer used to render the behaviours.

      • postRender

        public void postRender()
        Instantiates and destroys pending game objects or behaviours. Call this after render(Batch).

      • destroy

        public void destroy(Behaviour behaviour)
        Marks the behaviour for deletion at the end of the current frame.
        Parameters:
        behaviour - The behaviour instance to remove.

      • destroy

        public void destroy(GameObject go)
        Marks the game object and all its behaviour for deletion at the end of the current frame.
        Parameters:
        go - The behaviour instance to remove.

      • findBehaviours

        public <T extends Behaviour> com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<T> findBehaviours(java.lang.Class<T> behaviourClass)
        Finds all behaviour instances with the specified type. Allocations an array inside this method.
        Parameters:
        behaviourClass - The class type we want to search for.
        Returns:
        The found behaviour or null.

      • findBehaviours

        public <T extends Behaviour> com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<T> findBehaviours(java.lang.Class<T> behaviourClass,
                                                                            com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<T> tempStorage)
        Finds all behaviour instances with the specified type.
        Parameters:
        behaviourClass - The class type we want to search for.
        tempStorage - A temporary array to store all behaviours in it. Therefore, there's no array allocation happening in this method.
        Returns:
        All found behaviours or empty array.

      • invalidateRenderOrder

        public void invalidateRenderOrder()
        When a behaviours render order gets updated unBox doesn't get notified about that, hence you need to call this method afterwards.

      • getOptions

        public PhysicsOptions getOptions()

      • getPhysicsWorld

        public TPhysicsWorld getPhysicsWorld()
